title: Dashboard Board Order
excerpt: I would like to order/ reorder the order in which the bards are displayed in the dashboard. currently boards are added to the dashboard view by oldest to newest. it would be nice to be able to move the boards up and down…

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to order/ reorder the order in which the bards are displayed in the dashboard. currently boards are added to the dashboard view by oldest to newest. it would be nice to be able to move the boards up and down the list for reorganize how they are viewed. Either by click and drag or in the settings where you add boards, the order selected is the order they would appear in the dashboard.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Amanda115

Thanks so much for your feature suggestion. I definitely agree this would be a great improvement to the User Interface I’ve gone ahead and made sure this is in the right location within the community, so our developers are able to see this and consider the change accordingly.

-Alex

posts.author: abdelaney (Austin)
posts.cookedHtml:
So glad that I found someone else interested in this idea, rather than me duplicating it anew.
This feature would be hugely helpful to our account’s workflow as well

posts.author: MeghanPM (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. This discussion is 2+ years old now, and I’m still searching for the capability now. Could you please prioritise this? It seems like a relatively “low-hanging fruit” that would improve UX for so many!

posts.author: pete1 (peter conway)
posts.cookedHtml: knocking on this door again! I’d love this enhancement.

posts.author: Domandu (Dominick Coppinger)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 - Also currently struggling with the problem of how to order a whole series of boards within a couple of Dashboards

posts.author: nick.owens (Nick Owens)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this feature is needed. Currently, if I want to re arrange the order of widgets on a dashboard, I have to recreate and delete. This is time consuming and frustrating. I would hope this could get some priority in the dev pipeline.

posts.author: lindsaydreece (Lindsay Reece)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this. I am also seeing requests from 5 years ago in regards to being able to sort dashboard views. Is this on a feature roadmap anywhere? The whole purpose of a dashboard is to use for reporting and it make sit EXTREMELY ineffective when it does not allow you to sort the columns shown, especially date columns

posts.author: a.vanoppen (Gus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed this is a very important feature. We have multiple boards we include in an overview dashboard to do our planning. Some boards are more important than others so being able to reorder these is important to have a good overview.

@monday team: could you please give us an update on this?

posts.author: PoulLiebmann (Poul Liebmann)
posts.cookedHtml: Please give an update on this. Is the feature being worked on or will it never be implemented? Seems rather must-have for a Dashboard which main goal is to create an overview.

posts.author: D.Red (devonred@umich.edu)
posts.cookedHtml: I also wanted to add that I found myself searching on how to reorder groups/boards in the dashboard view and was disappointed it’s not a capability. It’s been a few years - please add this to the Monday.com roadmap.
